[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110011011 7
1 0111111001 7
2 1000011110 5
3 0000000000 a
4 1000110111 6
5 1110000111 6
6 0100000111 4
7 1000011010 4

12 21 0100000111 4 match 6

34 43 0000000010 1

56 65 0110011001 5

70 07 1000010110 4
